items.opportunity_title: Hospital website redesign and patient portal UX
items.signal_summary: Regional health system RFP for website rebuild, CMS migration, and WCAG compliance.
items.fit_notes: Healthcare + website — strong ninety two fit
items.raw_text: Capital Region Medical Center seeks a qualified vendor for a full website redesign including discovery, UX, design system, CMS implementation, accessibility audit, and 90-day post-launch support.

items.opportunity_title: Fleet rebrand and facility signage program
items.signal_summary: National logistics company rolling out rebrand across 40+ terminals.
items.raw_text: Greenfield Logistics announced a corporate rebrand requiring updated fleet graphics, terminal signage, wayfinding, and brand standards documentation across Northeast facilities.

items.opportunity_title: Brand refresh and branch marketing toolkit
items.signal_summary: Credit union opening 6 new branches — needs brand refresh and launch campaign assets.
items.recommended_action: Confirm decision maker and branch rollout timeline before outreach
items.raw_text: Summit Credit Union plans six branch openings over 18 months and is evaluating agency partners for brand refresh, campaign templates, and in-branch marketing systems.
